exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your disability accommodation forward
items: Document your current challenges and accommodation needs in a detailed written assessment
Research and gather all relevant medical documentation and disability-related records from your healthcare providers
Research and compile a comprehensive list of your legal rights under the ADA, Section 504, and other relevant disability laws
Schedule consultation appointments with 2-3 disability advocacy organizations or disability resource centers in your area
Create a comprehensive accommodation request template that includes your specific needs, proposed solutions, and supporting rationale
Research and identify the specific disability coordinator or ADA compliance officer at your workplace, school, or housing provider
